headline: A Look At Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: What Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) investors are watching now Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) is back on many watchlists after recent share price swings, with the stock down around 11% over the past week and about 11% over the past month. At a last close of US$21.11, the company shows trailing 12 month revenue of US$9.83b and net income of US$423.25m, giving investors concrete figures to compare with its recent share performance.
